title: Manx
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Manx''''' was a [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] that served with the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic's]] [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|fleet]] during the height of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]'' {{1st}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
